title: Front Office Manager - Barbeque Nation - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Barbeque Nation - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Barbeque Nation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barbeque Nation:
Barbeque Nation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation!
